link_type: DOI / paper landing page | DOI landing page

Med.*): 5-center, double-blind RCT (N=255; cgiTBS n=128 vs standard F3 rTMS n=127). **No difference on the primary outcome** (GRID-HAMD-17; adjusted mean −0.31, 95% CI −1.87 to 1.24, **p=0.689**).
